ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "parent_dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES department_heads ("head_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_heads" (
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department head */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the department head */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the head's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the head's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("head_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity of the department's operations (rated 1-3) */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability of resources and staff (rated 1-3) */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of output and services (rated 1-3) */,
  "significance" INTEGER /* Significance of the department's impact on the corporation (rated 1-6) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Overall points for the department (sum of all metrics) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "alloc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation record */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., budget, personnel, equipment) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of resources allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of resource allocation */,
  "budget_cycle" TEXT /* Budget cycle (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alloc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategic_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategic plan */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategic plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategic plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., in progress, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategic_plans_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., executive, department head, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric record */,
  "alloc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource allocation record */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "metric_complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity of the department's operations (historical value) */,
  "metric_availability" INTEGER /* Availability of resources and staff (historical value) */,
  "metric_quality" INTEGER /* Quality of output and services (historical value) */,
  "metric_significance" INTEGER /* Significance of the department's impact on the corporation (historical value) */,
  "metric_points" INTEGER /* Overall points for the department (historical value) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (historical value) */,
  "resource_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of resources allocated (historical value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_alloc_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloc_id") REFERENCES resource_allocations ("alloc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, allocation) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
